title: Media Query Master
description: Boss challenge: Build a fully responsive navigation that transforms from a horizontal bar to a vertical mobile menu using media queries and flexbox
html:
Brand
  • Home
  • Products
  • Services
  • Contact
starterCss:
/* Build a responsive nav:
   Desktop (default): horizontal bar, brand left, links right
   Mobile (<768px): stack vertically, full-width links
   All states: dark background, white text, no list bullets */

validationRules.message: The nav should have a dark background (#212529)
The brand text should be white
Nav links should have no bullets

hints.text: Use flexbox for the nav layout. Media queries let you change flex-direction based on screen width.
Desktop: nav is flex row with space-between. Mobile (max-width: 768px): nav and links switch to flex-direction: column.
Use flex for horizontal layout, then @media (max-width: 768px) to switch to column direction.
